name: AnalysisModelHandler
summary: The AnalysisModelHandler class contains information related to analysis models.

constructors.name: AnalysisModelHandler
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisModelHandler class

methods.name: AddLoad
methods.summary: Adds a load to the analysis model. The ConstructionMethod must be SELECTED_PARTS, SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS or FLOOR_BY_SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS.

methods.name: AddPart
methods.summary: Adds a part to the analysis model. The ConstructionMethod must be SELECTED_PARTS, SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS or FLOOR_BY_SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS.

methods.name: RemoveLoad
methods.summary: Removes a load from the analysis model. The ConstructionMethod must be SELECTED_PARTS, SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS or FLOOR_BY_SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS.

methods.name: RemovePart
methods.summary: Removes a part from the analysis model. The ConstructionMethod must be SELECTED_PARTS, SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS or FLOOR_BY_SELECTED_PARTS_AND_LOADS.

methods.name: SetActiveModel
methods.summary: Sets the active model. The AnalysisModelName or ID has to be set.
